reference: Hello. This is a classical finding in the involvement of lymph nodes. Your doctor's prescription is needed to obtain the appropriate antibiotics and anti-inflammatory medications. These are usually bacterial infections; there may be a septic focus in the mouth, such as dental caries, an ulcer, tonsillitis, or something similar.
text: Hello? This is a classical finding in the involvement of lymph nodes. Your doctor's prescription is needed to obtain the appropriate antibiotics and anti-inflammatory medications. These are usually bacterial infections. There may be a septic focus in the mouth, such as dental caries, an ulcer, tonsillitis, or something similar.
